name: CONTRACT-BACKLOG-25
title: Simplification: consolidate 3 near-identical build-contract-* test files into data-driven test
description: test-build-contract-tdd-state-machine-sources.py, test-build-contract-absorbed-skill-sources.py, and test-rabbit-feature-spec-deployment.py are 3 near-identical files each asserting build-contract.json entry-name → source/destination for a single entry. A single data-driven test reading mappings from a small JSON fixture (or from spec invariants) would replace all three with ~30 lines.
